sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.105 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: An equation over a pro-$p$-group$G$is an expression$v(x)=1$, where$v(x)$is an element of the free pro-$p$-product of$G$and a free pro-$p$-group with basis$\{ x_1, , x_n \}$; solutions are sought in the affine space$G^n$. Is it true that a free pro-$p$-group is equationally Noetherian, that is, for any$n$every system of equations in$x_1, , x_n$over this group is equivalent to some finite subsystem ...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
